# wake install

Install a schedule from a TOML config file

## Flags

| Name | Short | Type | Default | Env | Description |
|------|-------|------|---------|-----|-------------|
| `--dry-run` |  | bool |  |  | Show generated units without installing |

## Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `config` | yes | Path to the schedule TOML file |
